units.content: Every detector in Plyknot is a pure function over coupling-map state
@detector decorator registers function and opts it into CI-enforced symmetry checks
Three legitimate exceptions exist with explicit encodings
@memoized_detector provides input-keyed caching that is functionally transparent
@seeded_detector with seed_source='input_hash' provides reproducible randomness from input
LLM calls are forbidden in detectors entirely
determinism, input-isolation, and no-mutation are required constraints for detectors
cache is functionally transparent because same input always produces same output with or without cache
seed is derived from input hash making detector deterministic for same input
